Metadata.title: Nguyen Tran Trung Nguyen — Mobile Engineer
Metadata.description: Portfolio of Nguyen Tran Trung Nguyen, a Mobile Engineer with experience in React Native, Flutter, NFC, RESTful APIs, and mobile delivery workflows.

Home.eyebrow: Mobile Engineer based in Ho Chi Minh City
Home.headline: I build mobile products on a strong technical foundation, with a clear focus on real user value.
Home.intro: My work covers React Native, Flutter, native NFC integrations, RESTful APIs, and release automation for mobile products in banking and internal platform environments.
Home.featuredIntro: A focused selection of projects that reflect my approach to product delivery, engineering execution, and mobile user experience.
Home.aboutTitle: A Mobile Engineer focused on both product quality and technical foundations.
Home.aboutBody: I turn business requirements into maintainable mobile solutions that support product goals, long-term stability, and a dependable user experience.
Home.ctaTitle: Looking for a dependable Mobile Engineer?
Home.ctaBody: I am open to conversations about career opportunities, product collaboration, and technical challenges in mobile development.
